meta.title: GT Table Block Demo
meta.description: Test the GT Table Block plugin, a light-weight enhanced variation to the core-table block.
meta.author: Birgit Pauli-Haack (bph)

steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
if ( get_post( 1000 ) ) { return; }
$markup = base64_decode( '' );
wp_insert_post( [
    'import_id'    => 1000,
    'post_type'    => 'post',
    'post_status'  => 'publish',
    'post_title'   => 'Roster of Design Tools — Sticky Header Demo',
    'post_content' => $markup,
] );
